key_implementations.details: Created a high-fidelity hero section using gradients (bg-gradient-to-br), shadows (shadow-2xl), and glassmorphism without external images.
Implemented real-time class management, statistics (today's classes, total reservations), and a professional sidebar navigation.
Built a multi-step booking process using Firestore transactions to ensure data integrity (ticket deduction and capacity check).
Developed a cohesive Login/Join system with role-based routing (ADMIN vs USER) and profile update functionality (Firestore + Firebase Auth synchronization).

troubleshooting_and_tips.finding_code: How to map browser elements to VS Code using unique Tailwind classes and 'Material Symbols' keywords.
troubleshooting_and_tips.common_errors: Understanding 500 server errors and mapping 'class' in browser to 'className' in React.
troubleshooting_and_tips.asset_management: Best practices for importing images via 'src/assets' vs 'public' folders.

future_development_prompt: 이 JSON 파일의 맥락을 바탕으로, 사용자가 수업을 취소했을 때 이용권을 다시 복구해주고 예약 내역에서 삭제하는 '예약 취소 로직'을 MyReservations.tsx에 추가해줘.
